output: Updated task #8 status

text:
Migration complete. Here's a summary of everything that was done:

## Migrated Files

| Pages Router (removed) | App Router (created) | Key Changes |
|---|---|---|
| `pages/_app.js` | `app/layout.tsx` | Replaced `Component` pattern with `children` + root layout |
| `pages/_document.js` | ↑ (merged into `layout.tsx`) | `<Html>`/`<Head>`/`<Main>`/`<NextScript>` → metadata export + `<html>`/`<head>`/`<body>` |
| `pages/_error.js` | `app/error.tsx` | `getInitialProps` → `'use client'` error boundary with `error` + `reset` |
| `pages/404.js` | `app/not-found.tsx` | Removed `useRouter` → used `<Link>` for navigation |
| `pages/index.js` | `app/page.tsx` | `getServerSideProps` → async Server Component with `headers()` from `next/headers`; `useRouter` → `<Link>` |
| `pages/blog/index.js` | `app/blog/page.tsx` | `getStaticProps` + `revalidate` → Server Component + `export const revalidate = 60` |
| `pages/blog/[id].js` | `app/blog/[id]/page.tsx` | `getStaticPaths` → `generateStaticParams`; `getStaticProps` → Server Component; `router.isFallback` → `loading.tsx` |
| `pages/api/posts/index.js` | `app/api/posts/route.ts` | `req/res` handler → named `GET`/`POST` exports with `NextRequest`/`NextResponse` |
| `pages/api/posts/[id].js` | `app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts` | `req/res` handler → named `GET`/`PUT`/`DELETE` exports |

## App Router Patterns Applied

- **`useRouter`** from `next/router` → replaced with **`useRouter` from `next/navigation`** (in the back-button client component) and **`<Link>`** for programmatic navigation
- **`Head` from `next/head`** → replaced with **`generateMetadata`** / **`metadata`** exports
- **`getServerSideProps`** → replaced with **async Server Component** + **`headers()`** from `next/headers`
- **`getStaticProps`** → replaced with **async Server Component** + `export const revalidate`
- **`getStaticPaths`** → replaced with **`generateStaticParams`** + `dynamicParams: true` (default)
- **`router.isFallback`** → replaced with **`loading.tsx`** for the segment
- **API `req/res`** pattern → replaced with **`NextRequest`/`NextResponse`** route handlers
- **`_app.js` CSS import** → moved to **`app/layout.tsx`**
- **`AppProvider.js`** → converted to **`.tsx`** with **`'use client'`** directive and proper TypeScript types
